inbound_signal: data foundation implementation completed and pnpm okr:invoice-triage exposed a false-positive watcher gate that was corrected
decision_delta: mark the data-foundation slice as implemented, keep objective incomplete, and move next execution to runtime surfaces instead of claiming watcher readiness
direct_effect: objective metric moved from 2 to 7 of 13 gates while six operational gates remain red
expected_effect: next slice should target CLI, server, real directory watcher, real Codex, and Compose without weakening the corrected watcher metric

hallucination_sweep.claim: The database engine is tag-selected and tests use the same scope seam.
A generic watch method is not a directory watcher.

missing_context_sweep.claim: No REST, CLI, real directory watcher, real Codex, or Compose path exists yet.

unexpected_results.claim: The first data pass made stdin_only_intake_count and directory_watcher_gap_count falsely pass through a generic watch regex.

anti_goal_violation_review.claim: No lint/typecheck/test failure is accepted after the data foundation slice.

learning_collected: Directory watcher detection must be filesystem-specific; generic watcher APIs are not operational intake.
Model provider execution can move through ctx.exec({ fn }) without reintroducing bound.
steering_decision: Proceed to runtime-surface work after broad repo verification.
